description:
You are a state epidemiologist preparing a weekly infectious disease briefing. Gather current surveillance data from CDC FluView (https://www.cdc.gov/flu/weekly/), CDC MMWR (https://www.cdc.gov/mmwr/), WHO Disease Outbreak News (https://www.who.int/emergencies/disease-outbreak-news), and CDC NNDSS (https://www.cdc.gov/nndss/). Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Disease Surveillance' containing at least 5 bookmarks from these sources. Compile your findings into a JSON file at '~/Documents/surveillance_briefing.json' including the current surveillance week, ILI activity level, the most recent MMWR report details, the latest WHO global outbreak alert, and at least 3 nationally notifiable conditions.

Use the following JSON structure:
{
  "briefing_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "influenza": { "source_url": "...", "surveillance_week": "...", "ili_activity_summary": "..." },
  "mmwr_latest": { "source_url": "...", "title": "...", "publication_date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "summary": "..." },
  "who_outbreak_news": { "source_url": "...", "title": "...", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "disease": "...", "location": "...", "summary": "..." },
  "notifiable_diseases": [ "Disease 1", "Disease 2", "Disease 3" ]
}
